story_angle: somber obituary for a lost era or institution
headline: Aether-Train Derailment Claims Twelve Lives
deck: Investigators suspect sabotage by Luddite activists.
article:
Records from the Metropolitan Archives confirm that an aether-train derailment has resulted in the tragic loss of twelve lives. The report cites six independent witnesses.

Dr. Eliza Marsh shared insights with this publication, highlighting the underlying tensions that have long been overlooked. 'We mapped this possibility in 1878,' they stated. 'No one wanted to acknowledge it.'

In the cathedral quarter, residents recounted a profound silence that enveloped the area for three minutes. One shopkeeper assessed the incident through the lens of inventory losses rather than dramatic narratives.

The Office of Correct Records released a 281-word statement that left many questions unanswered while introducing several new ones.

Tomorrow's edition will delve into the financial aspects, the motives behind the act, and the one detail that every spokesperson has notably avoided mentioning.
author: Local Editor

oped.title: The Moral Cost of Automaton Labor
oped.author: A Concerned Clergyman
oped.body: When a man is replaced by brass and steam, what becomes of his soul? We must consider not merely the efficiency of the factory, but the dignity of the worker who once stood within it.

Comes equipped with plush seating and a fully stocked bar. Contact Captain Hawthorne at the Airship Dock, London.

Learn the Secrets of the Cosmos! Enroll in our exclusive Celestial Navigation Course at the Royal Academy of Sciences. Discover the art of star mapping and the wonders of the universe as we prepare for man’s first journey into the stars. Classes commence this autumn!

Rare Opportunity: Invest in the Future of Space Exploration! Join us in funding the first Space Expedition to the Moon in 1950. Limited shares available in the Astronautics Exploration Company. For further information, inquire at the offices on Fleet Street.

Experience the Thrill of the Cosmic Circus! Coming this winter to the Grand Theatre: a dazzling performance showcasing acrobats, aerialists, and the latest inventions in space travel. Tickets available at the box office. Don’t miss this extraordinary event!

panels.caption: Did you hear about the aether-train derailment?
I prefer timelines where that sort of thing is impossible.

joke.setup: Why did the aether-engine refuse overtime?
joke.punchline: It was already phased for the weekend.
joke.text: Why did the aether-engine refuse overtime? It was already phased for the weekend.

sponsor_ads.body: Savor the exquisite flavors of the universe with our pioneering foodstuffs sourced from the Martian fields and lunar orchards. Delight your palate with our rare interstellar delicacies, now available at your local grocer.

sponsor_ads.body: Behold the celestial wonders through our patented Astra Spectacle, the finest optical instrument for stargazers and astronomers alike. Illuminate your evenings with the beauty of the stars, as you chart your own course through the night sky.
